RuleSet.Name: schema/dbcreate/oracle/crtbl_table_idg32.plsql
RuleSet.Descr: Oracle Create Id32 Generator Table PL/SQL Script
RuleSet.GenFile:
-- -- @(#) $GenPackageDir$/$GenFileName$ $MssDoubleDashScriptLicense$ CREATE TABLE $lower DbSchemaName$.$popto Table DbTableName$_idg32 ($popto Table reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( each clause_IdgCreateColComma )$ slice_id SMALLINT$clause_NotNull$, next_id $clause_ColType$$clause_NotNull$ ) TABLESPACE $lower DbSchemaName$_data1$RunSqlStmt$
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX $lower DbTableName$_idg32_pidx ON $lower DbSchemaName$.$popto Table DbTableName$_idg32($popto Table reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( each clause_PKeyColComma )$ slice_id ) TABLESPACE $lower DbSchemaName$_idx1$RunSqlStmt$
ALTER TABLE $lower DbSchemaName$.$popto Table DbTableName$_idg32 ADD CONSTRAINT pk_$lower popto Table DbTableName$_idg32 PRIMARY KEY ($popto Table reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( each clause_PKeyColComma )$ slice_id )$RunSqlStmt$
